subject: [PATCH 2/3] mm/pagewalk: let folio_walk_start() run under the per-VMA lock

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch allows the folio_walk_start() function to run under the per-VMA lock instead of the mmap lock, reducing contention and improving performance for callers that only need to read a single page. The per-VMA lock is used when the FW_VMA_LOCKED flag is passed, which requires RCU-freed page tables and excludes hugetlb VMAs. This change does not affect existing callers, as none currently pass the FW_VMA_LOCKED flag. The patch also adds documentation to explain the new flag and its requirements.
